primary.name: Andrew Fabiano, CFA

primary.selection_basis: Bio states he oversees investment strategy, asset allocation and manager selection - the person who evaluates/commits investments; owner not evidenced as allocating.

secondary.name: Christopher Scott Witham
secondary.title: Owner/controlling member (via Witham Trust -> Rimar Development)

notes: Extract MISSED the owner Witham. NAMESAKE TRAP: christopherwitham.com is a different person (marketing consultant). Fabiano leads investments but title is only PM. Only info@cambient.com published.

primary.name: Matt Blackburn
primary.title: Managing Partner / Managing Director & co-founder, Class VI Family Office
primary.selection_basis: Runs the FO day-to-day, 'actively involved in investment strategy, asset allocation, security selection' AND Schedule A member-owner - can commit the FO (unlike Younger/Tolson on the bank side).
primary.affiliation_asof: team page 2026; co-founded FO Sept 2016; Schedule A member since 10/2018

secondary.name: Luke McCaslin
secondary.title: Director of Investment Advisory, Class VI Family Office
secondary.selection_basis: Investment specialist - 'asset allocation decisions, manager selection, due diligence on private investments' - hands-on allocation authority.

notes: KEY CORRECTION: extracted Younger/Tolson run the affiliated INVESTMENT BANK, not the FO day-to-day (they remain top Schedule A control-owners, escalation only). FO decision-makers are Blackburn + McCaslin. Email on shared classvipartners.com domain.

primary.name: Tony (Anthony M.) Lopiccolo, CFA
primary.title: Principal & Chief Investment Officer
primary.selection_basis: Named CIO of a small owner-run firm, Schedule A owner/executive, with a PUBLISHED individual email - clearest best-reachable decision-maker.

secondary.name: Mitchell John Herr
secondary.title: Principal (Founding, on investment committee)
secondary.selection_basis: Founding Principal on the IC, Schedule A owner/executive with control; planning/balance-sheet role distinct from CIO, published email.

notes: Best-documented: two founding principal-owners, both Schedule A owner/executives, BOTH published emails. Lopiccolo (CIO) primary over Herr. Extract was correct.
